speaker: charlie
text: That wraps up another brilliant day of good news from around our amazing world. From women environmental champions to scientific breakthroughs worth millions, there's so much to celebrate out there.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely Alex! Whether it's cranes making comebacks or scientists unlocking the secrets of the universe, human curiosity and determination keep making our world better. Tomorrow we'll have more stories that prove optimism is always justified.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right mate. Keep spreading the good vibes, Queensland, and remember - every day brings new reasons to be hopeful about our future.

speaker: alice
text: From all of us at ParkSyde Bright Side, enjoy this gorgeous autumn day and keep looking for the light in everything around you.

speaker: charlie
text: See ya tomorrow for more brilliant news. This has been Alex, Jamie and Sam - stay bright, stay curious, and stay ParkSyde!
